info.title: Stellantis Connected Vehicle API
info.description:
Build Applications with Stellantis North America connected Vehicles.

For former PSA groupe vehicles, please visit https://developer.groupe-psa.io/

To view these docs SwaggerUI- https://developers.stellantis.com/apidocs.html

To view these docs ReDoc- https://developers.stellantis.com/docs.html

get.summary: Get details of account, showing all linked accounts
get.description: Get details of account including api key, vehicle accounts, owned VINs, geofence collections, and geofencing subscriptions.

post.description: Request API Account Credentials for Stellantis Cloud API

400.description: Your registration could not be processed at this time, please try again later

403.description: Account request already received for your_email@domain.com. account status is PENDING APPROVAL

post.summary: Link an API account to you Connected Vehicle account
post.description: Associate a Stellantis API Account to an existing Jeep, Maserati, Ram, Chrysler, Dodge Connect, Sirius XM Guardian, or Mopar.com connected vehicle account. One API account can be linked to many connected vehicle accounts. Connected vehicle account credentials must be valid and cannot be managed with this API. Your connected vehicle account must be enrolled and have eligible VINs. If subscriptions on an existing VIN are added to or removed from a connected vehicle account, call this API to refresh the linked account.

post.summary: Unlink / Remove Connected Vehicle account from API account
post.description: This API reverses the action of /link. VINs associated with the vehicle account being unlinked are removed from your Stellantis API account
Update API account password - this API must be called to set a permanent password after registration or a forgotten password reset using /resetpassword
Reset account password/forgotten password. This API will send a temporary to account email. Note, you must use /setpassword to set a permanent password after using this API
This API permanently deletes the API acount. Note that this request cannot be undone. To create a new account use /v1/account/register

post.summary: Retrieve a bearer token with API credentials
post.description: Retrieve a bearer token with API credentials

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: user name provided in api credentials

post.description: Remote commands for vehicle. Available commands are START, remote start CANCEL, UNLOCK, LOCK, or HORNS & LIGHTS

200.description: Command successfully sent to service delivery platform

get.summary: retrieves array of recent data sensor values
get.description: Gets vehicle data as an array. Timestamps are based on time collected on vehicle. Sensor array provided for up to last 8 hrs.

get.summary: retrieves last known data sensor values for a vehicle
get.description: Gets vehicle data for a provided sensor. Provides most recent sensor value.

post.summary: Submit general feedback, questions, comments to Stellantis.
post.description: Submit general feedback, questions, comments to Stellantis. For bug report, use /bugs
Submit Bug Report. For General feedback or questions, use /feedback instead

get.summary: Get details of all breach events.
get.description: Get details of all breach events for vins and geofence collections owned by the user. This data includes the time, breach type (ENTER or EXIT), geofence collection name, geofence ID, Latitude, and Longitude.

post.description: Create a geofence collection by providing fields named collection_name and entries. The geofence collection geometry may be one of Polygon or Circle.

requestBody.description: Data about the geofence collection name and points.

post.description: Add one or more geofences to an already created geofence collection.

requestBody.description: Geofences to add to the geofence collection. The geofence geometry may be Polygon or Circle.

post.description: Remove one or more geofences from the geofence collection by providing the IDs os the geofences.

requestBody.description: List of geofences to remove from geofence collection.

post.description: Delete a geofence collection permenantly.

post.summary: Create a subscription for a vin and a geofence collection.
post.description: Create a subscription for a vin and its movements in relation to geofences of a collection. Once the subscription is created, you may add subscribers to receive notifications about breach events to those endpoints.

get.summary: Retrieve subscription information for a vin and a geofence collection.
get.description: Retrieve all information about a particular subscription that tracks movements of a vehicle in relation to a geofence collection.

delete.summary: Delete geofencing subscription for a vin and a geofence collection.
delete.description: Delete a geofencing subscription. This action stops the tracking of a vehicle's movements in and out of a geofence collection.

get.description: Get details ofsubscriptions for your vehicle(s) and geofence collections.

post.summary: Enable geofencing notifications for a vin and a geofence collection.
post.description: Enable geofencing notifications for a vin and a geofence collection for all existing subscribers.

post.summary: Disable geofencing notifications for a vin and a geofence collection.
post.description: Disable geofencing notifications for a vin and a geofence collection for all existing subscribers.

post.summary: Subscribe to geofencing notifications for a VIN and geofence collection.
post.description: Subscribe endpoints such as phone numbers, email addresses, and head unit VINs to geofencing notifications. Subscribed head unit VINs will receive in-vehicle popups with geofence breach information.

requestBody.description: VIN, geofence collection, and endoints that subscribe to the geofencing notifications.

post.summary: Unsubscribe from geofencing notifications for a VIN and geofence collection.
post.description: Unsubscribe endpoints such as phone numbers, email addresses, and head unit VINs from geofencing notifications.

requestBody.description: VIN, geofence collection, and endoints to unsubscribe from the geofencing notifications.

post.description: Define endpoints for where VIN streaming information should be sent to.

get.summary: Retrieve streaming endpoints for the vin's data
get.description: Retrieve a list of all endpoints where a VIN data in being streamed to.

delete.summary: Delete information about the VIN streaming endpoints.
delete.description: Remove information about the VIN streaming endpoints. By performing this action, any endpoints previously defined will no longer retrieve streaming information about the VIN.

post.summary: Removes an endpoint from the list of endpoints where stream data for the VIN is sent to.
post.description: Removes an endpoint for the vin data streaming.

200.description: Command successfully sent to service delivery platform

usage_description.example: Briefly describe your use case, purpose for requesting access to the API

result.example: Your account request has been received. You will receive a response via email to the address specified.

message.example: Error, your password does not meet password requirements (Minimum length 8, 1 upper, 1 lower, one number and one special character)
Error, new password could not be set, please try again later
Error, your user name or current password is invalid

result.example: Account vehicle_account@domain.com is not currently linked to your_email@domain.com

message.example: Your password has been reset, a temporary password has been sent to your_email@domain.com
Error, password could not be reset, invalid api_account_owner.
Error, password could not be reset, please try again later.

result.example: Your account - your_email@domain.com - Has been deleted
Database Error - Database service unavailable, please try again later

feedback-content.example: Enter a detailed description of the issue.

GetGeofenceBreachesErrorResponse.example: There was an error retrieving geofence breach information.

GetGeofenceBreachesNoVINsErrorResponse.example: Error, no vins found for this user (your_email@domain.com).

ErrorPerformingOperationResponse.example: There was an error performing this operation.

ErrorPerformingOperationtryAgainResponse.example: There was an error performing this operation. Please try again later.

MaximumGeofenceCollectionEntriesErrorRes.example: A maximum of MAX_GEOFENCES_PER_COLLECTION geofences per collection is allowed. You are trying to add (X) geofences to the collection: collection_name.

MaximumGeofenceCollectionErrorResponse.example: Error occurred while creating the geofence collection. Maximum geofence collection limit MAX_GEOFENCE_COLLECTIONS reached.

BatchPutGeofenceResponse.example: Successfully added geofence(s) to geofence collection (collection_name).

BatchPutGeofenceErrorMaxGeofencesRespons.example: Error occurred while adding geofence(s) to the geofence collection (collection_name). Number of final geofences in a collection cannot exceed MAX_GEOFENCES_PER_COLLECTION.

BatchPutGeofenceErrorResponse.example: There was an error while adding geofence(s) to the geofence collection.

BatchPutGeofenceErrorTryAgainResponse.example: There was an error performing this operation. Please try again later.

BatchDeleteGeofenceResponse.example: Successfully deleted geofence(s) from geofence collection (collection_name).

BatchDeleteGeofenceCollectionNotFoundRes.example: There was an error deleting geofences from the collection (collection_name). This geofence collection was not found.

BatchDeleteGeofenceErrorRemovingResponse.example: There was an error while removing the geofence(s) from the geofence collection.

DeleteGeofenceCollectionNotFoundResponse.example: There was an error deleting this geofence collection. This geofence collection was not found.

DeleteGeofenceCollectionErrorResponse.example: There was an error deleting the geofence collection (collection_name).

CreateGeofencingSubscriptionResponse.example: Success! Subscription created successfully for vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name.

CreateGeofencingSubscriptionAccessDenied.example: Access denied. Either vin, geofence collection, or both are not owned by the user (your_email@domain.com).

GetGeofencingSubscriptionAccessDeniedRes.example: Access denied. Either vin, geofence collection, or both are not owned by the user (your_email@domain.com).

GetGeofencingSubscriptionNotFoundRespons.example: Error: cannot get details for vin: vin and collection name: collection_name.

DeleteGeofencingSubscriptionResponse.example: Success! Subscription for vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name deleted successfully.

DeleteGeofencingSubscriptionNotFoundResp.example: Error, the subscription information for vin (vin) and geofence collection (collection_name) was not found.

DeleteGeofencingSubscriptionErrorRespons.example: Error: please provide a VIN and a collection name.

DeleteGeofencingSubscriptionErrorRemovin.example: There was an error removing this subscription detail. Please try again later.

DeleteGeofencingSubscriptionErrorTryAgai.example: Error: There was an error deleting this subscription for vin: vin and collection: collection_name. Please try again later.

GetSubscriptionsErrorResponse.example: Error, no vins found for this user (your_email@domain.com).

EnableGeofencingNotificationsResponse.example: Success! Notifications for vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name are enabled.

GeofencingNotificationsErrorResponse.example: There was an error enabling notifications for vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027) and collection (collection_name).

GeofencingNotificationsNotFoundResponse.example: Error, the subscription information for vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027) and geofence collection (collection_name) was not found.

DisableGeofencingNotificationsResponse.example: Success! Notifications for vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection are disabled.

SubscribeToGeofencingNotifcationsRespons.example: Success! Subscriptions to vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name breach event added successfully.

SubscriptionDoesNotExistErrorResponse.example: Error: cannot get details for vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and collection: collection_name. This subscription does not exist.

SubscriptionNotFoundErrorResponse.example: Error, the subscription information for vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027) and geofence collection (collection_name) was not found. Please create a subscription first.

UnsubscribeFromGeofencingNotifcationsRes.example: Success! Subscriptions to vin: 3D7UT2CL0BG625027 and geofence collection: collection_name breach event removed successfully.

AddStreamingEndpointsResponse.example: Successfully added streaming endpoints for vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027).

AddStreamingEndpointsErrorResponse.example: There was an error enabling data collection on VIN 3D7UT2CL0BG625027

AddStreamingEndpointsMaxEndpointsErrorRe.example: An error occurred while trying to add streaming endpoints for the vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027). Maximum streaming endpoints per vin is MAX_STREAMING_ENDPOINTS.

StreamingEndpointsAccessDeniedResponse.example: Access denied. This vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027) is not owned by the account: your_email@domain.com.

ErrorPerformingActionTryAgainLater.example: There was an error performing this action. Please try again later.

NoStreamingEndpointsResponse.example: There are no streaming endpoints registered for this vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027).

DeleteVINStreamingInfoResponse.example: Successfully deleted streaming info for the vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027).

DeleteVINStreamingEndpointErrorResponse.example: There was an error deleting the streaming info for the vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027). Please try again later.

RemoveVINStreamingEndpointResponse.example: Streaming endpoint (STREAMING_ENDPOINT_1) successfully removed for vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027).

RemoveVINStreamingEndpointErrorResponse.example: An error occurred. This streaming endpoint (STREAMING_ENDPOINT_3) is not registered for vin (3D7UT2CL0BG625027).
